title: BUG #17398: Casts from BYTEA to TEXT and FLOAT4/8 to TEXT should not be immutable
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_bytea (data BLOB NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_bytea VALUES (CAST('616263' AS BLOB));
CREATE INDEX idx_bytea ON test_bytea(CAST(data AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CAST(data AS VARCHAR) FROM test_bytea WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Casts from BYTEA and FLOAT to TEXT are incorrectly immutable
